results.description: BLANKET PURCHASE AGREEMENTS FOR DRY DOCKING MAINTENANCE AND VESSEL REPAIRS. THE AGREEMENTS WILL HAVE A PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE OF FIVE (5) YEARS FROM THE DATE THE MASTER AGREEMENT IS ESTABLISHED. AS SERVICES ARE REQUIRED, THE GOVERNMENT WILL ISSUE A REQUEST FOR QUOTE (RFQ) TO VENDORS ACTIVELY HOLDING A BPA MASTER AGREEMENT.
